headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. H1 should be text-5xl or larger on landing.

body.usage: Standard text. Use text-base or text-sm for dashboard density.

code.usage: API snippets, keys, logs, JSON responses.

rules: Hero section must overlap with the navigation visually (glassmorphism).
Use 'sticky' scrolling for code examples vs feature list.
No scrollbars within widgets unless absolutely necessary.
Use 'subgrid' for alignment across cards if supported, else precise flex columns.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-md font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:border-gray-500 hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-md

cards.classes: bg-gray-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-xl rounded-xl

inputs.classes: bg-gray-950/50 border border-gray-800 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-md h-10 px-3 text-sm placeholder:text-gray-600 transition-all

animations.scanning_beam: absolute top-0 w-full h-[2px] bg-accent shadow-[0_0_10px_#10b981] animate-scan

motion.instructions: Use framer-motion for all entrance animations. Use CSS keyframes for continuous loops (like scanning beams).

images.description: Abstract digital neural network, dark theme. Use as background with overlay.
Close up of code on screen in dark room.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 20px for UI, 24px for navigation.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it's a very subtle shine effect.
Avoid 'Inter' font for headings. Use Manrope.
Interactive elements must have a defined hover state that increases brightness or contrast.
Dashboards must be dense. Avoid wasting space with large paddings in data tables.
Ensure all inputs have clear focus states (ring/border color change).
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure Tailwind with the provided colors in 'colors.palette'.
3. Set up the font families in 'index.css' importing from Google Fonts.
4. Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with Lenis scroll.
5. For the 'Scanning' effect in the hero, create a custom component using Framer Motion that moves a gradient line over a mock ID card.
6. Build the Dashboard using a Sidebar Layout (fixed left, scrollable right).
7. Use the provided image URLs for the specific sections mentioned.
